name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually cluttered or templated slides that look unmistakably machine-made, undermining credibility in professional settings. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by giving teams an AI assistant that supports thoughtful design choices rather than overriding them. The result is presentations that feel authored, not auto-generated.
useCases: Create investor pitch decks that look hand-crafted rather than AI-generated
Build client-facing proposal presentations with consistent brand identity
Rapidly draft internal strategy or roadmap decks for executive reviews
Repurpose long-form documents or reports into structured slide narratives
